description:
The library `org.springframework.security:spring-security-web` version `5.7.12` was detected in `Maven library manager` located at `/home/ecp-app/CNY/app.jar -> BOOT-INF/lib/spring-security-web-5.7.12.jar` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2024-38821`, which exists in versions `< 5.7.13`.

The vulnerability was found in the [Github Security Advisory](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c4q5-6c82-3qpw) with vendor severity: `Critical` (awaiting NVD analysis, [CNA](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-38821) severity: `Critical`).

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Sources: [Github](https://github.com/mouadk/cve-2024-38821/tree/main), [VulnCheck](https://www.deep-kondah.com/spring-webflux-static-resource-access-vulnerability-cve-2024-38821-explained/).

The vulnerability can be remediated by updating the library to version `5.7.13` or higher, using `mvn versions:use-latest-releases -Dincludes=org.springframework.security:spring-security-web`.

The library `org.springframework:spring-webmvc` version `5.3.34` was detected in `Maven library manager` located at `/home/ecp-app/CNY/app.jar -> BOOT-INF/lib/spring-webmvc-5.3.34.jar` and is vulnerable to `CVE-2024-38819`, which exists in versions `<= 5.3.39`.

The vulnerability was found in the [Github Security Advisory](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g5vr-rgqm-vf78) with vendor severity: `High` (awaiting NVD analysis, [CNA](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-38819) severity: `High`).

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Sources: [VulnCheck](https://github.com/GhostS3c/CVE-2024-38819), [inTheWild](https://inthewild.io/vuln/CVE-2024-38819).

The vulnerability can be remediated by updating the library to version `6.1.14` or higher, using `mvn versions:use-latest-releases -Dincludes=org.springframework:spring-webmvc`.

The library is associated with the technology `Spring Web MVC`.

The vulnerability can be remediated by updating the library to version `6.1.13` or higher, using `mvn versions:use-latest-releases -Dincludes=org.springframework:spring-webmvc`.

The library is associated with the technology `Spring Web MVC`.
